# Branavan Selvasingham

> Builder focused on reliable AI systems, agent orchestration, robotics, simulation, and spatial computing.

## Hero

Branavan Selvasingham  
Reliable AI systems, robotics, simulation, and spatial computing

I build reliable AI systems for the real world.

VP, Head of AI & Product Engineering at Zafin.  
Focused on reliable agent orchestration with human oversight.

## Core Themes

- Agent orchestration: reliable agent orchestration with human oversight in enterprise workflows.
- Robotics: embodied AI experiments with the SO-101 and real-world control loops.
- Simulation: multi-agent worlds for coordination, escalation, and behavior over time.
- Spatial computing: VisionOS and AR experiments around 3D interfaces and interaction.

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://www.branavan.com/
- X: https://x.com/0_branavan_1
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/branavanselvasingham
- Medium (essays and experiments): https://medium.com/search?q=branavan+selvasingham
- GitHub: https://github.com/BranavanSelvasingham

## Selected Work

### Zafin - Agent Orchestration
AI and product engineering leadership across large-scale banking software, focused on reliable agent orchestration, human review loops, and production workflows.

### Nimbus POS
A bootstrapped point-of-sale platform for small cafes with inventory, low-click ordering, loyalty, analytics, Canadian tax support, and hardware workflows. Reached paying customers, exceeded operating costs, and exited through client/data acquisition. Built and operated from 2015 to 2018.

### SO-101 Robot Experiments
Embodied AI experiments with the SO-101, focused on perception, control loops, and action in the physical world.

### Many Lives
A multi-agent simulation exploring coordination, escalation, and persistent behavior in a shared world.

### VisionOS / Shape of μ
Spatial computing and AR experiments using VisionOS, SwiftUI, RealityKit, and 3D interfaces.

### IBM Achievement
Built large-scale systems used by millions and received formal technical recognition at IBM, including work recognized by the 2022 Outstanding Technical Achievement Award.

### Talks / Media / Industry Signal
Public-facing AI conversations and appearances tied to banking, AI, and product transformation, including Microsoft and Money20/20 sessions.

## Current focus

Most of my current work is concentrated in:

- Trusted agent orchestration and human review loops
- Reliable AI workflows in production settings
- Robotics and embodied interaction
- Simulation and multi-agent systems
- Spatial interfaces and AR experiments

## Current thinking

- The model is rarely the moat by itself; the operating loop around it usually matters more.
- Useful agents need structure: tools, permissions, verification, observability, and fallback.
- The hard part of applied AI is less the demo and more trust, reliability, and adoption in production.
- Frontier capability matters most when it becomes durable product leverage.

## Essays

Longer-form essays live on the site as dedicated reading pages. Some may also include an audio version.

### Gravity, Magnetism, and Love
On attraction between information systems.
https://www.branavan.com/essays/gravity-magnetism-and-love.html

---

## Projects by Theme

Grouped around the four themes above, plus some earlier work.

### Agent orchestration

#### Zafin
Current work focused on reliable agent orchestration, human review loops, and production AI workflows in enterprise software.

#### Podcast with Microsoft's Head of Banking Strategy
Conversation with Tyler Pichach about AI in financial services and enterprise software.
Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jtcGHd4MaBc

#### Money20/20 Presentation (2023)
Presented at Money20/20 on Microsoft's AI stage, sharing an early roadmap that was later built out and executed.

#### IBM production AI and orchestration work
- Production AI systems built and shipped for over 20 million users.
- 2022 Outstanding Technical Achievement Award for conversational AI orchestration work.
- Obfuscated certificate PDF: assets/media/selected-work/ibm-2022-outstanding-technical-achievement-award-obfuscated.pdf

#### Auditable Network of Containers
Published defensible IP for transactions between non-trusting parties using auditable networks.
Publication: https://priorart.ip.com/IPCOM/000260415/

### Robotics

#### SO-101 Robot (LeRobot)
Embodied AI experiments with the SO-101, including direct model control tests using tool calls, a gripper-mounted camera, and goal-loop control.
Repository: https://github.com/BranavanSelvasingham/lerobot-llm-chess

#### Vision-Based Robot Arm Motion
Robot arm motion systems with computer-vision-guided control and dynamic target tracking.

#### Robotic Conference and Vision
Remote interaction experiment combining robotic vision and conferencing.

#### Smart Locker
Secure physical system with ownership transfer flows and hardware/software coordination.

### Simulation

#### Many Lives
Multi-agent simulation exploring coordination, escalation, and persistent behavior in a shared world.
Project site: https://manylives-sim.branavan.com

#### Boston Dynamics Spot Simulation
Environmental simulations built to support robotics experiments with Boston Dynamics Spot.
Article: https://medium.com/learningreinforcementlearning/choosing-the-right-platform-to-begin-your-hands-on-journey-with-rl-c4110b6cd6d9

### Spatial computing

#### Shape of μ (VisionOS)
VisionOS project exploring 3D graphing and spatial interaction.

### Earlier work on interactive systems

#### Home Hub (Touch, Voice, Display)
Integrated home hub combining touch, voice assistant features, custom display behavior, gesture controls, and custom hardware.

#### Dynamic Retail E-Paper Labels
E-paper label system for dynamic pricing updates, including touch capability, dual display layouts, and proximity sensor behavior.

#### Smart Surface Projection
Projection experiment combining a robot arm and laser pico projector.

### Product building

#### Nimbus POS
Bootstrapped SaaS point-of-sale platform for small cafes with inventory management, streamlined ordering, loyalty, analytics, Canadian tax support, and wireless-printing integrations. Reached paying customers, exceeded operating costs, and exited through data and client acquisition.

#### Video Transcript Analysis
Web application (thegreatmind.org) for organizing long-form video artifacts, linking transcripts to specific videos, and editing subtitle text to extract useful structure from video content.

## Education

### MBA - Schulich School of Business, York University
Focus: Finance and Entrepreneurship

### Mechanical Engineering - University of Waterloo
Focus: Robotics and Aerodynamics.  
Fourth-year research: ornithopter/drone flight mechanics and aerodynamics.

*Last updated: March 2026*
